mnemonics: Mother Never Forgets Incredible Snacks To Understand Complex Math
Mike's Nice Friends Insist Sunshine Travels Uniting Kids
keyPoints: Insertion: Insert a node with a greater value than the root in AVL tree
Traversals: Inorder - Left Root Right, Preorder - Root Left Right, Postorder - Left Right Root
Searching: In AVL tree, compare the target value with the root node's value
Copying: Copy the tree by creating a new root node and recursively copying child nodes
Binary Search Tree: Left subtree of a node contains only values less than the node, Right subtree contains values greater than the node
Insertion in BST: If the value to be inserted is greater than the root, insert it in the right subtree, else insert in the left subtree
Searching in BST: Compare the target value with the root node's value, move left or right based on comparison result
Find Maximum in BST: Start from the rightmost leaf node and move towards the root, the last node will be the maximum
Find Minimum in BST: Start from the leftmost leaf node and move towards the root, the first node will be the minimum
